allow: Bash(bash scripts/hardening-audit.sh --json 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('JSON: valid'\)" 2>&1)

Bash(bash scripts/hardening-audit.sh --json 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
s = data['summary']
actual_pass = sum\(1 for r in data['results'] if r['status'] == 'PASS'\)
actual_fail = sum\(1 for r in data['results'] if r['status'] == 'FAIL'\)
actual_warn = sum\(1 for r in data['results'] if r['status'] == 'WARN'\)
actual_skip = sum\(1 for r in data['results'] if r['status'] == 'SKIP'\)
print\(f'Summary says: {s[\\"pass\\"]}P {s[\\"fail\\"]}F {s[\\"warn\\"]}W {s[\\"skip\\"]}S'\)
print\(f'Actual items: {actual_pass}P {actual_fail}F {actual_warn}W {actual_skip}S'\)
print\(f'Total items in results array: {len\(data[\\"results\\"]\)}'\)
print\(f'Summary total: {s[\\"total\\"]}'\)
match = \(actual_pass == s['pass'] and actual_fail == s['fail'] and actual_warn == s['warn'] and actual_skip == s['skip']\)
print\(f'Counters match: {match}'\)
")
Bash(bash -n scripts/hardening-fix.sh && echo "fix: OK" && bash -n scripts/audit-notify.sh && echo "notify: OK" && bash -n scripts/audit-cron.sh && echo "cron: OK")
Bash(bash -n scripts/hardening-audit.sh && echo "audit: OK" && bash -n scripts/hardening-fix.sh && echo "fix: OK")
Bash(bash -n scripts/hardening-audit.sh && bash -n scripts/hardening-fix.sh && echo "Both OK")

Bash(.specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh --json --number 4 --short-name "hardening-coverage-map" "Hardening guide coverage mapping with inline automation annotations, CHK-REGISTRY sync, and coverage metrics")

Bash(.specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh --json --number 5 --short-name "chromium-cdp-hardening" "Chromium CDP hardening: auto-fix for CDP port binding, version freshness, dangerous launch flags, browser data cleanup, and GETTING-STARTED.md integration")
Bash(bash -n scripts/hardening-audit.sh && echo "audit: OK" && bash -n scripts/hardening-fix.sh && echo "fix: OK" && bash -n scripts/audit-cron.sh && echo "cron: OK")
Bash(bash -n scripts/hardening-audit.sh && bash -n scripts/hardening-fix.sh && bash -n scripts/audit-cron.sh && bash -n scripts/audit-notify.sh && echo "All scripts: OK")
Bash(bash -n scripts/audit-cron.sh && bash -n scripts/audit-notify.sh && bash -n scripts/hardening-fix.sh && echo "All syntax OK")

Bash(bash -n scripts/browser-registry.sh && echo "PARSE OK" && bash -n scripts/hardening-audit.sh && echo "AUDIT PARSE OK" && bash -n scripts/hardening-fix.sh && echo "FIX PARSE OK" && bash -n scripts/browser-cleanup.sh && echo "CLEANUP PARSE OK")

Bash(bash -n scripts/browser-registry.sh && echo "registry: OK" && bash -n scripts/hardening-audit.sh && echo "audit: OK" && bash -n scripts/hardening-fix.sh && echo "fix: OK" && bash -n scripts/browser-cleanup.sh && echo "cleanup: OK")
